name: That Golf Place
about: That Golf Place is a private indoor golf studio located in Westmont, Illinois. It offers a premium, flexible environment for golfers to practice or play year-round, utilizing high-end technology in soundproofed simulator bays. The venue is exclusively for members and provides keyless access and an online booking system to accommodate a range of schedules, from early morning to late night sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade Foresight Falcon launch monitor technology providing precise ball and club data
Private, soundproofed simulator bays with no lines or distractions
Flexible 4 AM to 12 AM access with keyless entry for ultimate convenience
GSPro gameplay access to play iconic courses like Augusta National and Pebble Beach

food_and_drink.notes: Not mentioned as an on-site amenity
Not mentioned as an on-site amenity

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor technology used by pros and coaches

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether you need to bring your own clubs or if rentals are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy on bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing a full 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, That Golf Place offers free and discounted youth lessons, mentorship, and supervised access for young golfers.
